name: model-info
description: Get 100% accurate, real-time AI model information including model name, provider, API endpoint, session status, token usage, and runtime configuration
author: AutoClaw

skill.name: model-info
skill.description: Provides accurate, real-time information about the currently active AI model directly from OpenClaw's session status
usage: Ask 'model info' or 'what model' or 'model status' to get full details
examples: Show me my current model info
Tell me about my AI backend
skill.install: Skill will auto-discover from skills folder. No external dependencies.
